_meta.warning: No token configured — returning empty scaffold.

expected_behavior: Adapter MUST NOT raise an exception or emit an error claim when result is an empty array.
Adapter MUST return an empty list of normalized claims, not null or a missing key.
Adapter MUST surface the _meta.warning as a CollectorWarning diagnostic claim (not a failure).
Adapter MUST treat X-Total-Count: 0 as confirmation that the query ran successfully with zero matches.
Adapter empty-scaffold fallback (no-token CI path) MUST produce a structurally identical response shape with the same _meta.warning text.

primary_citation.quote: Retrieves multiple records for the specified table. The response body contains the data in JSON format.

provenance.sanitization: ServiceNow instance hostname replaced with uiao-dev.service-now.com. Bearer token redacted to <TOKEN>. No record data present. The _meta block mirrors the empty-scaffold fallback shape in servicenow_collector.py.
